zh.Donegal, Ireland: 愛爾蘭庫迪 迪拉利多聶加爾
zh.lifeSummary: Rose O'Donnell於1479年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 迪拉利多聶加爾。她於1505年與Connal MacGowan在愛爾蘭庫迪 迪拉利多聶加爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Rose O'Donnell于1479年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 迪拉利多聶加爾。她于1505年与Connal MacGowan在爱尔兰庫迪 迪拉利多聶加爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: O'Donnell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Brigid, Niall, Siobhan, Brennan, Bridie, Declan, Donal, Fergus, Jarlath, John Patrick, Padraic.

Irish (Donegal, Munster): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Domhnaill ‘descendant of Domhnall’, an old personal name composed of the Celtic elements domno- ‘world’ + val- ‘might, rule’. Compare the Anglicized form Donald and the Scottish clan name McDonald .

History: The O'Donnells, like the O'Neills (see   O'Neill  ), claim descent from Niall of the Nine Hostages (Niall Noígíallach), a legendary 5th-century king of Ireland. Their traditional base is Tyrconnell (i.e. Donegal).

variants.name: O'Daniel
meanings: Irish: variant of   O'Donnell  , influenced by the Biblical name   Daniel  , to which it is etymologically unrelated.

variants.name: O'Donald
meanings: Irish: Scotticized form of O'Donnell . The Irish personal name Domhnall was Latinized as Donaldus, which is the source of Donald, the form of the personal name used in English in Scotland, though not in Ireland. The form O'Donald is therefore a 19th-century hybrid. Compare Donald .

variants.name: Donald
meanings: Scottish: shortened form of McDonald (Mac Dhomhnaill), from the Gaelic personal name Domhnall; found in 13th- and 14th-century Scotland as Dofnald, Douenald, Dufenald, and Donald.
Irish (Ulster): possibly also a shortened and altered form of Irish   O'Donell  .

nameMeanings.name: Rose
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Ostensibly from the vocabulary word denoting the flower (Latin rosa). However, the name was in use throughout the Middle Ages, long before any of the other girls' names derived from flowers, which are generally of 19th-century origin. In part it may refer to the flower as a symbol of the Virgin Mary, but it seems more likely that it also has a Germanic origin, probably as a short form of various girls' names based on hros ‘horse’ or hrōd ‘fame’. The Latinate form Rohesia is commonly found in documents of the Middle Ages. As well as being a name in its own right, it is currently used as a short form of Rosemary and, less often (because of their different pronunciation), of other names beginning Ros-, such as Rosalind and Rosamund .

historicEvents.description: Henry VIII dies, succeeded by the boy king Edward VI. England and Ireland were ruled by the senior nobility of England.

en.lifeSummary: Rose O'Donnell was born in 1479, in Donegal, County Tipperary, Ireland. She married Connal MacGowan in 1505, in Donegal, County Tipperary, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Rose O'Donnell est née en 1479, à Donegal, County Tipperary, Irlande. Elle a épousé Connal MacGowan en 1505, à Donegal, County Tipperary, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Rose O'Donnell wurde 1479 in Donegal, County Tipperary, Irland geboren. Sie hat 1505 in Donegal, County Tipperary, Irland Connal MacGowan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Rose O'Donnell è nata il nel 1479 nel Donegal, County Tipperary, Irlanda. Lei sposato Connal MacGowan nel 1505, nel Donegal, County Tipperary, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio.

ja.Donegal, Ireland: アイルランドコウントイ ティップエラリードンエガル
ja.lifeSummary: Rose O'Donnellは1479年にアイルランドコウントイ ティップエラリードンエガルで生まれた。1505年にアイルランドコウントイ ティップエラリードンエガルでConnal MacGowanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Rose O'Donnell(은)는 1479년 아일랜드 카운티 티페라리 도네걸에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1505년 아일랜드 카운티 티페라리 도네걸에서 Connal MacGowan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Rose O'Donnell nasceu em 1479, em Donegal, County Tipperary, Irlanda. Ela casou-se com Connal MacGowan em 1505, em Donegal, County Tipperary, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Rose O'Donnell родилась в 1479 г. в местности доунегаль, коунти типпирэри, Ирландия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Connal MacGowan в 1505 г. в местности доунегаль, коунти типпирэри, Ирландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Rose O'Donnell nació en 1479, en Donegal, County Tipperary, Irlanda. Se casó con Connal MacGowan en 1505, en Donegal, County Tipperary, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo.
